mapper.sql: id, username, phone, email, password, status, remaining_duration, total_recharge, last_login_time, register_ip, register_device, register_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM usr_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM usr_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM usr_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO usr_user (username, phone, email, password, status, remaining_duration, total_recharge, last_login_time, register_ip, register_device, register_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.username}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.password}, #{item.status}, #{item.remainingDuration}, #{item.totalRecharge}, #{item.lastLoginTime}, #{item.registerIp}, #{item.registerDevice}, #{item.registerTime}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.deleted})
